summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEXA EATS Restaurant Management System. Backend API testing achieved 96.3% success rate (26/27 tests passed). Frontend navigation and core functionality testing successful across all major features.

resolved_issues.issue: Order creation was failing with 520 error due to serialize_doc function being called before _id was properly set
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Fixed the order creation endpoint to properly serialize the order document after _id is set

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing button clicks in some cases
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in automation or ESC key to close modals

design_issues.issue: Logout button selector not easily identifiable in automated testing

passed_tests: AI Features (Sales Prediction, Food Recommendations, Inventory Forecast, Assistant)
Navigation to all pages (Menu, Tables, Orders, Kitchen, Inventory, Reports, AI Insights, Users)
